title: Single-shot time-folded fluorescence lifetime imaging.
author: Kapitany V Zickus V Fatima A Carles G Faccio D
content: S-EPMC10120087 PMC10120087 Single-shot time-folded fluorescence lifetime imaging. Fluorescence lifetime imaging is an important tool in bioimaging that allows one to detect subtle changes in cell dynamics and their environment.
